inventory_kpis_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns inventory_kpis (1m8bqrv)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock,
    count(*) as stock_positions,
    sum(case when is_zero_stock then 1 else 0 end) as zero_stock_positions
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
) AS "inputQuery-_k"

inventory_kpis_length.sql_string:
---- Length inventory_kpis (1m8bqrv)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock,
    count(*) as stock_positions,
    sum(case when is_zero_stock then 1 else 0 end) as zero_stock_positions
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
) AS "inputQuery-_k")

inventory_kpis_data.sql_string:
---- Data inventory_kpis 1m8bqrv
SELECT * FROM (select
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock,
    count(*) as stock_positions,
    sum(case when is_zero_stock then 1 else 0 end) as zero_stock_positions
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
) AS "inputQuery-_k"

inventory_plant_stock_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns inventory_plant_stock (1mjx8e4)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    client_id,
    plant_id,
    plant_name,
    plant_name || ' (' || client_id || '/' || plant_id || ')' as plant_label,
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock_qty
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
where plant_name != 'Unmapped Plant'
group by 1, 2, 3, 4
order by unrestricted_stock_qty desc
limit 10
) AS "inputQuery-Lg"

inventory_plant_stock_length.sql_string:
---- Length inventory_plant_stock (1mjx8e4)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    client_id,
    plant_id,
    plant_name,
    plant_name || ' (' || client_id || '/' || plant_id || ')' as plant_label,
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock_qty
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
where plant_name != 'Unmapped Plant'
group by 1, 2, 3, 4
order by unrestricted_stock_qty desc
limit 10
) AS "inputQuery-Lg")

inventory_material_groups_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns inventory_material_groups (62ms2x)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    material_group,
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock_qty,
    count(*) as stock_positions
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
group by 1
order by unrestricted_stock_qty desc
limit 15
) AS "inputQuery-LU"

inventory_material_groups_length.sql_string:
---- Length inventory_material_groups (62ms2x)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    material_group,
    round(sum(unrestricted_stock_qty), 0) as unrestricted_stock_qty,
    count(*) as stock_positions
from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
group by 1
order by unrestricted_stock_qty desc
limit 15
) AS "inputQuery-LU")

inventory_material_groups_data.sql_string:
---- Data inventory_material_groups 62ms2x

group by 1

) AS "inputQuery-LU"

inventory_zero_stock_hotspots_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns inventory_zero_stock_hotspots (9r8va9)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (with zero_stock_hotspots as (
    select
        client_id,
        plant_id,
        plant_name,
        plant_name || ' (' || client_id || '/' || plant_id || ')' as plant_label,
        storage_location_id,
        count(*) as zero_stock_positions
    from greenplanetmart.inventory_positions
    where is_zero_stock
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    order by zero_stock_positions desc, plant_label
    limit 20
)

select
    client_id,
    plant_id,
    plant_name,
    plant_label,
    storage_location_id,
    zero_stock_positions
from zero_stock_hotspots

union all

select
    'N/A' as client_id,
    'N/A' as plant_id,
    'No zero-stock positions found in the current snapshot' as plant_name,
    'No zero-stock positions found in the current snapshot' as plant_label,
    'N/A' as storage_location_id,
    0 as zero_stock_positions
where not exists (
    select 1
    from zero_stock_hotspots
)
) AS "inputQuery-68"
